response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with over 12 years in full-stack development, aligning well with the mid-senior level role. His expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and database technologies (MongoDB, PostgreSQL) matches the primary stack, while his experience with Kotlin/Java and AI agent infrastructure (re:cinq) adds depth. His contributions to scalable systems, open-source projects, and leadership in testing frameworks (TDD, CI/CD) highlight his problem-solving and architectural skills. The resume also showcases strong communication, collaboration, and mentorship through workshops and open-source contributions.
strengths: Deep expertise in full-stack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the core stack requirements
Proven track record in scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong leadership in testing, CI/CD, and DevOps practices, with contributions to open-source projects and workshops demonstrating technical mentorship
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement, though TypeScript/Node.js expertise may offset this gap
No explicit mention of Vitest (testing framework) in recent roles, though general testing expertise (Jest, Selenium) is evident
Some roles (e.g., GISCollective) use Ember.js and Dlang, which are not part of the primary or secondary stack, though adaptability is demonstrated

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure and modern DevOps practices
